title: AI Convention Lifecycle Corpus v2.0.0 — Expanded 209-Repository Dataset and Adoption–Maintenance Framework

creators.name: César Andrés
creators.affiliation: CRIA-BDHS Research Group, Higher Polytechnic School of Technology and Science, Universidad Camilo José Cela, C/de Juan Hurtado de Mendoza, 4, 28036 Madrid, Spain

creators.name: David Martín Moncunilla
creators.affiliation: CRIA-BDHS Research Group, Higher Polytechnic School of Technology and Science, Universidad Camilo José Cela, C/de Juan Hurtado de Mendoza, 4, 28036 Madrid, Spain

description:
Self-contained replication package for an MSR study of AI instructional artifacts on GitHub (e.g. AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, Copilot/Cursor rule paths, prompts/ trees).

Research question: Does snapshot adoption of these paths at HEAD reflect git-based maintenance within a lookback window?

v2 cohort: 220 discovered adopted repositories; 209 extracted and analyzed; 13,988 ever-introduced artifact instances. Primary maintenance window T = 180 days.

Headline results: artifact-level mature-present gap 56.0%; repository-level gap 7.2%.

Contents: frozen YAML protocols, seed URL lists, Python discovery/extraction/analysis pipeline, Parquet/CSV/JSON aggregates, bootstrap and sensitivity outputs, 40-row annotation sample.

Not included: full git clones (data/repos/); re-extraction clones public URLs from data/lifecycle/discovered_v2.csv.

Reproduction: make verify-headline (offline check); make analyze (offline recompute); make lifecycle-v2 (full pipeline). See README.md, metadata/replication_package.md, and docs/reproducibility.md.

Licensing: aggregated data CC-BY 4.0; source code MIT (LICENSE).
notes: Code is MIT-licensed; note dual licensing in deposit description.
